name: Dirac Systems - CRM Lead Router Case Study

parameters.query:
with input_data as (
  select
    nullif($q${{ $json.event_id }}$q$, '')::text as event_id,
    nullif($q${{ $json.first_name }}$q$, '')::text as first_name,
    nullif($q${{ $json.last_name }}$q$, '')::text as last_name,
    nullif($q${{ $json.email }}$q$, '')::text as email,
    nullif($q${{ $json.phone }}$q$, '')::text as phone,
    nullif($q${{ $json.company_name }}$q$, '')::text as company_name,
    nullif($q${{ $json.source }}$q$, '')::text as source,
    nullif($q${{ $json.help_needed }}$q$, '')::text as help_needed,
    nullif($q${{ $json.urgency }}$q$, '')::text as urgency,
    nullif($q${{ $json.referral_source }}$q$, '')::text as referral_source,
    $q${{ $json.raw_payload_json }}$q$::jsonb as raw_payload
), inserted as (
  insert into lead_events (
    event_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    email,
    phone,
    company_name,
    source,
    status,
    raw_payload
  )
  select
    event_id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    email,
    phone,
    company_name,
    source,
    'received',
    raw_payload
  from input_data
  on conflict (event_id) do nothing
  returning id, event_id
)
select
  input_data.event_id,
  input_data.first_name,
  input_data.last_name,
  input_data.email,
  input_data.phone,
  input_data.company_name,
  input_data.source,
  input_data.help_needed,
  input_data.urgency,
  input_data.referral_source,
  exists(select 1 from inserted) as inserted,
  case
    when exists(select 1 from inserted) then 'received'
    else 'duplicate_event'
  end as workflow_status
from input_data;

with lead_input as (
  select
    $q${{ $json.event_id }}$q$::text as event_id,
    nullif($q${{ $json.email }}$q$, '')::text as email,
    nullif($q${{ $json.first_name }}$q$, '')::text as first_name,
    nullif($q${{ $json.last_name }}$q$, '')::text as last_name,
    nullif($q${{ $json.phone }}$q$, '')::text as phone,
    nullif($q${{ $json.company_name }}$q$, '')::text as company_name,
    nullif($q${{ $json.help_needed }}$q$, '')::text as message,
    nullif($q${{ $json.urgency }}$q$, '')::text as urgency,
    nullif($q${{ $json.source }}$q$, '')::text as source
), existing_contact as (
  select c.id
  from contacts c, lead_input li
  where lower(c.email) = lower(li.email)
  limit 1
), upserted_contact as (
  insert into contacts (
    email,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    phone,
    company_name
  )
  select
    lower(email),
    first_name,
    last_name,
    phone,
    company_name
  from lead_input
  on conflict (email) do update
  set
    first_name = coalesce(excluded.first_name, contacts.first_name),
    last_name = coalesce(excluded.last_name, contacts.last_name),
    phone = coalesce(excluded.phone, contacts.phone),
    company_name = coalesce(excluded.company_name, contacts.company_name),
    updated_at = now()
  returning
    id,
    email,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    phone,
    company_name
), created_request as (
  insert into lead_requests (
    event_id,
    contact_id,
    message,
    urgency,
    source,
    status
  )
  select
    li.event_id,
    uc.id,
    li.message,
    li.urgency,
    li.source,
    'pending'
  from lead_input li
  cross join upserted_contact uc
  on conflict (event_id) do nothing
  returning
    id,
    event_id,
    contact_id,
    message,
    urgency,
    source,
    status
)
select
  li.event_id,
  uc.id as contact_id,
  cr.id as request_id,
  uc.email,
  uc.first_name,
  uc.last_name,
  uc.phone,
  uc.company_name,
  cr.message,
  cr.urgency,
  cr.source,
  cr.status as request_status,
  case
    when exists(select 1 from existing_contact) then 'existing_contact_new_request'
    else 'new_contact_new_request'
  end as crm_outcome
from lead_input li
cross join upserted_contact uc
cross join created_request cr;

with updated_request as (
  update lead_requests
  set
    classification = $q${{ $json.classification_json }}$q$::jsonb,
    status = 'classified',
    updated_at = now()
  where id = $q${{ $json.request_id }}$q$::uuid
  returning
    id as request_id,
    event_id,
    contact_id,
    message,
    urgency,
    source,
    status as request_status,
    classification
), updated_event as (
  update lead_events
  set
    classification = $q${{ $json.classification_json }}$q$::jsonb,
    status = 'processed',
    updated_at = now()
  where event_id = $q${{ $json.event_id }}$q$
  returning
    event_id,
    status as event_status
)
select
  ur.request_id,
  ur.event_id,
  ur.contact_id,
  $q${{ $json.email }}$q$::text as email,
  $q${{ $json.first_name }}$q$::text as first_name,
  $q${{ $json.last_name }}$q$::text as last_name,
  $q${{ $json.phone }}$q$::text as phone,
  $q${{ $json.company_name }}$q$::text as company_name,
  ur.message,
  ur.urgency,
  ur.source,
  ur.request_status,
  ue.event_status,
  $q${{ $json.crm_outcome }}$q$::text as crm_outcome,
  ur.classification
from updated_request ur
cross join updated_event ue;

insert into lead_event_logs (
  event_id,
  step,
  status,
  message,
  metadata
)
values (
  $q${{ $json.event_id }}$q$,
  'request_classified',
  'success',
  $q$Lead request classified and linked to CRM contact$q$,
  $q${{ JSON.stringify($json) }}$q$::jsonb
)
returning
  event_id,
  step,
  status,
  message,
  created_at;

insert into lead_event_logs (
  event_id,
  step,
  status,
  message,
  metadata
)
values (
  $q${{ $json.event_id }}$q$,
  'duplicate_event',
  'skipped',
  'Duplicate webhook event_id skipped',
  $q${{ JSON.stringify($json) }}$q$::jsonb
)
returning
  event_id,
  step,
  status,
  message,
  created_at;
